rules.name: sip_uri_phone_user
rules.description: SIP URIs whose user part is a phone number, e.g. sip:0312345678@example.com

rules.name: contact_via_header_ip
rules.description: Contact/Via headers containing IP addresses (masked as a whole line, before the generic IPv4 rule runs)

rules.name: jp_phone_number
rules.description: Japanese-style phone numbers appearing in SIP log bodies

rules.name: ipv4_address
rules.description: Generic IPv4 addresses not caught by the header-specific rule above
